name: chart-the-course
description: Governance scaffold for Chart the Course.

scripts.build:sbom: npm ci && npx @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm --omit dev --output-format JSON --output-file sbom.json --validate
scripts.license:check: npm run license:allow && npm run license:deny
scripts.compliance: npm run build:sbom && npm run license:check && npm run audit:prod
